# Copilot Instructions

Use English as the default output language for this repository.

- Write code comments in English.
- Write README and Markdown documentation in English.
- Write changelog and release text in English.
- Prefer English for generated examples, explanations, and technical notes.

Allowed exceptions:

- Keep quoted user content in its original language when quoting directly.
- Do not translate code identifiers, API names, commands, paths, or product names.
- If bilingual content is requested, provide and maintain a complete English version.
